programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts the game show, inviting three pairs of shoppers to 'go wild in the aisles' as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a £3,000 prize. New quiz rounds feature, alongside the legendary trolley dashes

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Healthcare co-ordinator Brad from Pontefract in West Yorkshire puts his faith in the fashion choices of Ashley, James and Mike

programme.title: Love Bites
programme.desc: Using just their culinary skills, single guys Jake, Cornel and Luke all compete to win a date with Brighton beauty Nina

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Priya is relieved, Harriet makes a big decision and Al is broken

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Celebrity lookalikes star in a selection of comical clips filmed by viewers on their camcorders, mobile phones and webcams, as Hollywood actress Annette Bening receives unwanted attention from her dog, and Kim Jong-il demonstrates the lighter side of North Korea with a few practical jokes. Harry Hill narrates

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: With Ellen away, tWitch steps in to host. He talks to Jessica Alba about The Honest Company, before chatting to Harry Shum Jr about All My Life.

programme.title: Ellen's Game of Games
programme.desc: Volunteers from Ellen's studio audience play her outrageously fun games - including Runaway Bride, Aw Snap and more - for the chance to win a cash prize

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Manchester, Jason, Nathan and Jake all hope to impress hotel bookings agent Olivia with their style choices

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness presents a new series of the dating game show. A model, a circus performer, a football coach and a salesman enter the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval

programme.title: Love Bites
programme.desc: Scarlett Moffatt is joined by 27-year-old Kyle from Newcastle, who hopes that his love of good food will help him pick his perfect date

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring accidents involving basketball, babies, buckets of water and bottles of Prosecco

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Surreal comedy from the mind of Harry Hill, inspired by viewers' clips. Mick Jagger's son attempts a daring backflip, Caroline Flack has an unforgettable experience at a fracking party and a girl gets a little too close to the stingrays at a zoo

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates another selection of comical disasters captured in video form via viewers' smartphones, tablets and drones. This time, a rider is crushed by his own quad bike, an errant catamaran causes chaos on a beach, and a man plays a practical joke on his family in which he fakes losing a finger

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring a demolishment that causes even bigger problems, a wave attacking a holiday maker, and a giraffe getting up close and personal with an unwilling recipient

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter takes up smoking, and is quickly approached by an advertising executive who wants him to be the face of a new campaign - for an anti-smoking group. Meanwhile, Stewie helps Chris battle some school bullies

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter and his friends fight to save their favourite booth in the Drunken Clam after it is claimed by another group of men. Meanwhile, Brian passes on herpes to Stewie. Adult animation, featuring the guest voice of Bryan Cranston (Breaking Bad)

programme.title: Ibiza Weekender
programme.desc: A surprise drop in puts the spotlight firmly on David, and the arrival of two very different sets of guests means the group are going to have their hands full

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter takes Stewie to the park for some father-son bonding, but ends up bringing home someone else's baby. After Lois chastises him for being so stupid, he goes to Chicago on a business trip and returns an intelligent, classy person

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins fall victim to Italy's immigration laws after Peter destroys the family's passports during a visit to the country. With the voices of Seth MacFarlane, Alex Borstein and Seth Green

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Francine gets a job at Stan's office, which leaves him unable to flirt with his co-workers - and to make matters even worse, jealousy leads to an awful encounter

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: After her family accuses her of being a quitter, Francine becomes a bodybuilder. Meanwhile, Klaus lays claim to have invented the high five

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Junior writes a profile of his dad for a school project about his favourite American - but his idealised vision is shattered when Cleveland suffers an embarrassing injury after falling off the toilet. Meanwhile, Rallo is thrilled to discover he is finally tall enough to ride a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Donna is unhappy about her relationship with mother Dee Dee, so Cleveland tries to cheer her up by hiring an actress to pose as her mum - but when the real Dee Dee unexpectedly visits, he spots an opportunity for a genuine reconciliation. With the guest voices of Phylicia Rashad (The Cosby Show) and Loretta Devine (Waiting to Exhale)

programme.title: Hey Tracey!
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts a Halloween edition of the comedy quiz, with Bobby Norris, Rita Simons, Ellie Taylor, Darren Harriott, Jordan North and Tallia Storm trying to win some normal people £2,500 and a stay in a haunted pub

programme.title: Iain Stirling's CelebAbility
programme.desc: Famous faces Megan McKenna, Will Best, Keith Duffy, Ola Jordan and Stephen Bailey take on five friends in a series of challenges. Game show, hosted by Iain Stirling

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maureen finds Maud helpless on the floor. Jim is hurt when Fiona does not send him a wedding invite. Les turns nasty on Angie for sacking Leanne

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera looks forward to her 40th wedding anniversary. Gary refuses to give Zoe the money up front. Mickey and Pete scare Maud and rob the shop

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kirsty tries to prove to Lyn that nothing is wrong with her. Zak's dry cleaning scam does not go to plan. Will's rugby trial ends in disaster

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Sugdens put Will up while he recovers from his injury. Tara has a shock announcement for Chris and Zoe. Lyn confides in Rachel about Kirsty's bulimia

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Two new residents put PC Mason in an awkward position both professionally and personally and, while the village rallies round to celebrate Blaketon's birthday, he gets more than he expected when Gina goes into labour. David decides to learn to play the piano. Rural police drama set in the rustic backwater of Aidensfield, Yorkshire. Starring Joe McFadden, Tricia Penrose and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sally interpret Sid's dreams and Trevor tries to recreate the atmosphere of the previous night

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The couple offer their services to a woman in labour, despite their lack of experience - though George does know how to dismantle a motorbike. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An encounter with a gang of armed men presents Miller with a difficult dilemma that puts his professional and personal future in jeopardy. Mason and Wetherby struggle to deal with student protesters who are furious at the presence of a suspected Nazi collaborator in the town, and the situation escalates further when an attempt is made on the man's life. John Duttine and Joe McFadden star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tara worries about the consequences of selling Home Farm. Eric faces the licensing magistrate in court. Heather and Lyn find Kirsty being sick behind the village hall

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Heather tries to talk to Kirsty, who insists there is nothing wrong with her. Emma receives a mystery bunch of flowers. Kim calls the Glovers and agrees to the paternity test

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The police find Les's car, but it has been written off. Alec encourages Jack to employ some attractive barmaids. Kevin rows with Natalie for seeing Sally

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack and Vera celebrate their 40th wedding anniversary. Natalie is annoyed when Nick refuses to back down over money. Ken toasts the Duckworths on behalf of the residents

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bell-ringers of Midsomer Wellow are mysteriously murdered one by one - and it seems an ancient rhyme may hold the key to the killer's motive. As Barnaby and Troy embark on a baffling investigation in an attempt to determine the truth, Joyce starts digging into the past to discover the assassin's motives. John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Hugh Bonneville star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Kersey and Lane investigate the death of a fisherman, who was killed while at sea, and find EC quotas are taking their toll in more ways than one. They also discover a new sense of rivalry in their working relationship, but a bit of healthy competition could give them the edge they need to solve the case. Jack Shepherd stars, with Jimmy Yuill and Helen Masters

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is brought in to investigate when a former Met police officer is stabbed to death outside a nightclub in Newcastle. The team initially suspects a crime of passion after it emerges the victim had recently rekindled his affair with his childhood sweetheart, whose husband has a history of violence. However, Vera uncovers evidence pointing to a more complex case involving inside information and the hostile takeover of a brewery. What did the deceased find out that cost him his life? Guest starring Jill Halfpenny, Christine Bottomley, Ralph Ineson and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Millionaire's wife Mary Pritchard, a notoriously demanding invalid, apparently dies of shock in her locked room when the geranium in her wallpaper turns blue, fulfilling the dire warning of a mysterious fortune teller. The manner of her death creates a sensation in the tense village community of Little Ambrose, but although the woman's husband confesses to the crime, Miss Marple uncovers new evidence that could affect the court hearing's outcome and races to halt proceedings before the wrong person is convicted. Starring Julia McKenzie, with Toby Stephens, Sharon Small, Patrick Baladi, Caroline Catz, Claire Rushbrook and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The couple go to a family wedding, but they don't bargain on Jean's cousin Peggy being there

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is not feeling his usual self, so he goes to see the doctor

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George decides to place his father in a residential home, but the old man would rather stay with his son. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A notorious burglar escapes from prison and returns to Aidensfield to pursue a vendetta against Ashfordly police. Roping in two local boys, the villain dupes them into helping him carry out his plan while PC Mason desperately tries to find him before he strikes again. Dawn sets Joyce up on a date with PC Younger - but is oblivious to the fact that the young copper actually has feelings for her. George Cole guest stars, with Joe McFadden and John Duttine

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned worries about the blood tests. Eric takes drastic measures when he finds Kathy celebrating taking over ownership of the wine bar. Zak and Butch attempt to find some rent money

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon confronts Eric about dousing the wine bar in paraffin. Kirsty admits to making herself sick, and Scott tells Kelly he is not going back to the army

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie tells Sally that her maintenance has been cut off. Alec suggests installing a jukebox in the Rovers. Vera is happy with her night of passion with Jack

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie gets an alarming letter from Nick's solicitor. Kevin asks Sally to accept less money but she refuses. Des begs Samantha to stay in Weatherfield

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A psychiatrist's wife is murdered in a seemingly unprovoked attack, and establishing a motive proves harder than catching the killer. Meanwhile, Lane and Kersey disagree at every turn of the investigation. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour detective

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid has problems when Jean pleads for a new freezer

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Henpecked George finally finds a job, but the line of work could make him unpopular with road users. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Carol tries to help struggling single mum Barbara while dealing with the news that a woman claiming to be her own mother has arrived in Aidensfield. The nurse is then taken aback when Janet has the idea of reuniting them. Meanwhile, Mason's fears for Barbara are proved right after a shocking turn of events, and Wetherby and Younger enlist Peggy to search for the chief constable's missing dog

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon tries to cover up the smell of paraffin before Kathy arrives for work. Heather is determined to find a new home. Marlon tells Lyn the truth about the night before

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff is shocked to discover Tara is evicting the Glovers. Kirsty insists she is pleased her bulimia is out in the open now. Zoe offers to help Ned and the Dingles

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin tells Chris that he has left Natalie, and he asks Sally to take him back. Zoe goes into premature labour after drinking with Leanne

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin attempts to prove to Sally that he's never going back to Natalie, and Gail advises Sally to forgive him. Gary is tearful when Zoe gives birth to a girl

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a woman is found strangled, a pathologist detects chilling similarities with a number of unsolved murders - prompting Wycliffe and his team to reopen 11-year-old case files. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Tim Wylton and Helen Masters

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A commercial decision to turn Midsomer Deverell's memorial garden into a tea shop proves fatal for members of the Inkpen family. DCI Barnaby's investigation unearths more than mere local hostility as he lifts the lid on long-buried secrets. Anna Calder-Marshall and Margaret Tyzack guest star

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: American GIs arrive in Hastings to a mixed welcome and Foyle is called on to calm the locals. But his attempts at soothing relations are jeopardised when a barmaid's involvement with a visiting soldier results in murder, leading the detective to defy orders to keep the peace and solve the case. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell, Honeysuckle Weeks and Keith Barron

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Heather tries to talk to Kirsty, who insists there is nothing wrong with her. Emma receives a mystery bunch of flowers. Kim calls the Glovers and agrees to the paternity test

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An encounter with a gang of armed men presents Miller with a difficult dilemma that puts his professional and personal future in jeopardy. Mason and Wetherby struggle to deal with student protesters who are furious at the presence of a suspected Nazi collaborator in the town, and the situation escalates further when an attempt is made on the man's life. John Duttine and Joe McFadden star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is not feeling his usual self, so he goes to see the doctor

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George decides to place his father in a residential home, but the old man would rather stay with his son. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A notorious burglar escapes from prison and returns to Aidensfield to pursue a vendetta against Ashfordly police. Roping in two local boys, the villain dupes them into helping him carry out his plan while PC Mason desperately tries to find him before he strikes again. Dawn sets Joyce up on a date with PC Younger - but is oblivious to the fact that the young copper actually has feelings for her. George Cole guest stars, with Joe McFadden and John Duttine

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned worries about the blood tests. Eric takes drastic measures when he finds Kathy celebrating taking over ownership of the wine bar. Zak and Butch attempt to find some rent money

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon confronts Eric about dousing the wine bar in paraffin. Kirsty admits to making herself sick, and Scott tells Kelly he is not going back to the army

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie tells Sally that her maintenance has been cut off. Alec suggests installing a jukebox in the Rovers. Vera is happy with her night of passion with Jack

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie gets an alarming letter from Nick's solicitor. Kevin asks Sally to accept less money but she refuses. Des begs Samantha to stay in Weatherfield

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A pupil at the prestigious Devington School dies of a stab wound while competing in a race in honour of his recently deceased grandfather. DCI Barnaby discovers the death could be linked to a long-running rivalry between the school and the locals - or to the youngster's membership of an elite club dedicated to dining on suet puddings. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A psychiatrist's wife is murdered in a seemingly unprovoked attack, and establishing a motive proves harder than catching the killer. Meanwhile, Lane and Kersey disagree at every turn of the investigation. Jack Shepherd stars as the dour detective

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice

programme.desc: Sid has problems when Jean pleads for a new freezer

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Carol tries to help struggling single mum Barbara while dealing with the news that a woman claiming to be her own mother has arrived in Aidensfield. The nurse is then taken aback when Janet has the idea of reuniting them. Meanwhile, Mason's fears for Barbara are proved right after a shocking turn of events, and Wetherby and Younger enlist Peggy to search for the chief constable's missing dog

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon tries to cover up the smell of paraffin before Kathy arrives for work. Heather is determined to find a new home. Marlon tells Lyn the truth about the night before

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff is shocked to discover Tara is evicting the Glovers. Kirsty insists she is pleased her bulimia is out in the open now. Zoe offers to help Ned and the Dingles

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin tells Chris that he has left Natalie, and he asks Sally to take him back. Zoe goes into premature labour after drinking with Leanne

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin attempts to prove to Sally that he's never going back to Natalie, and Gail advises Sally to forgive him. Gary is tearful when Zoe gives birth to a girl

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a woman is found strangled, a pathologist detects chilling similarities with a number of unsolved murders - prompting Wycliffe and his team to reopen 11-year-old case files. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Tim Wylton and Helen Masters

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A commercial decision to turn Midsomer Deverell's memorial garden into a tea shop proves fatal for members of the Inkpen family. DCI Barnaby's investigation unearths more than mere local hostility as he lifts the lid on long-buried secrets. Anna Calder-Marshall and Margaret Tyzack guest star

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: American GIs arrive in Hastings to a mixed welcome and Foyle is called on to calm the locals. But his attempts at soothing relations are jeopardised when a barmaid's involvement with a visiting soldier results in murder, leading the detective to defy orders to keep the peace and solve the case. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell, Honeysuckle Weeks and Keith Barron

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sally interpret Sid's dreams and Trevor tries to recreate the atmosphere of the previous night

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A priceless French diamond is stolen from its London display. However, with Holmes missing, Watson and Mycroft are forced to pursue the investigation themselves. Detective drama, guest starring Charles Gray, with Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Jim reveals his gentler side when Harriet's friend is found murdered, but the case is clouded when the victim's vengeful father gets in the way. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Emma is enticed into the imposing mansion of an elderly bridge expert, where she is forced to get by without Steed, who is at home nursing a sprained ankle. Ronald Lacey guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry panics after putting himself in an incriminating position by leaving his fingerprints on a stolen lorry full of electrical items he has collected for Arthur. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole meets the California-based Brit who is reviving the American chopper. He also discovers the joys of Soviet-era sidecars, and rides vintage flat tankers in Cornwall

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Two sisters receive unwanted gifts at Christmas - severed human ears. Holmes is enlisted to discover where they came from - and uncovers a disturbing tale of deceit and infidelity. Jeremy Brett stars in his curtain call as the famous detective

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Though innocent, Regan finds himself targeted by the man's vengeful brother who thinks the detective is responsible for his sibling's condition. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Enemy agents use a fiendish device to transfer their minds into the bodies of Steed and Mrs Peel - whose subsequent strange behaviour makes them a threat to national security. Freddie Jones and Patricia Haines guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Dave's relief manager lets him down at short notice, he asks Terry to step into the breach and run the Winchester Club for him. However, concerns mount for both Terry and Arthur when the landlord fails to return as planned - especially as the club's licence is due for imminent renewal. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole's restoration of a race bike reaches a climax, and he also trains to become a volunteer motorcyclist delivering supplies of blood to hospitals

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: I'm a Celebrity 2013 winner Kian Egan, former Olympic swimmer Sharron Davies, presenter Matt Johnson and actor Larry Lamb compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh asks the questions

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team has been given just two days and a 20 thousand dollar budget to remove a 10-metre steel-hulled yacht from Cockburn Beach in Western Australia. The problem is the boat is buried deep in the sand and it's a danger to beach goers. Heavy machinery specialist Ryan is going to use his monster excavator to try and get the job done. However, to make the budget work, he needs to be done and dusted in 24 hours

programme.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory (1995)
programme.desc: A retired Navy veteran travelling by train is forced to leap into action when he realises terrorist hijackers are on board. Their leader, a vengeful former government operative with access to a powerful orbital weapon, is threatening to set off a chain of earthquakes if his demand for $1billion is not met. Action adventure sequel, with Steven Seagal, Eric Bogosian, Morris Chestnut, Brenda Bakke and Katherine Heigl

With best friend Aime coming along to help him look for a new forever home, he calls on the house-hunting skills of Scarlette Douglas to find him the perfect city pad. Donagh has a maximum budget of £125,000 and a long wishlist, so the pressure is on Scarlette to deliver

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: An escaped horse causes mayhem at an Italian B&B. Elsewhere in France, a British couple reopen their guesthouse after months of enforced lockdown

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six young bakers create baking illusions that deceive the eye, before making a mysterious cake with a central line that reveals the flavours on the inside

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Ollie turns to drugs once more when his dad lets him down, and the key witness agrees to give a statement. Elsewhere, Nana helps Goldie sell some of her clothes

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp catches up with Julie and Allen in Stoke, a couple who appeared on the show in 2019, to see if they followed through with their decision. Julie and Allen could not agree on any of the many houses they had viewed together, so they turned to Kirstie and Phil to help end their decade-long debate - should they sell their home or stay put and renovate?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets energy conservationist Andrew, who has decided to build a radical, self-heating home for his family - the first of its kind in the UK. He aims to heat the house all year round by storing the warmth of the summer sun into insulated earth banks over and around the house, and then drawing the warmth back into the living spaces in winter. However, this pioneering construction seems an exercise in trial and error from the start, and what began as a seemingly simple, pure concept becomes a complicated feat of engineering

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. This time, Gordon visits Botto's in Swedesboro, New Jersey. It's a family-owned business which Gordon thinks has an interior more like a funeral parlour, so he and the team roll their sleeves up and give it a renovation and a new menu

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of emergency services. The entire process is captured, from the moment a call is taken at the control centres to the deployment of the police, ambulance teams and fire crews, following them to the front line as they deal with the unpredictable, the shocking and the sometimes disturbing

programme.title: Billionaire Cruise Ship: Paradise Island
programme.desc: A look at the day-to-day life on the private island of Ocean Cay - an exclusive, luxurious tropical paradise in the Bahamas. The island is owned by the giant cruise liner company, MSC Cruises, and three times a week a ship carrying over 5,000 expectant holidaymakers arrives, who demand the very best service and facilities

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Paul and Glenda kick off the competition in their static caravan, but eyebrows are raised at his unromantic approach to his relationship. On day two self-confessed gadget geek David and his partner Jane show their competitive side with a confidently presented, well-received meal. Finally outdoorsy twentysomethings Matt and Polly show off their 'good life' approach to cooking with a home-grown feast

programme.title: Crimson Peak (2015)
programme.desc: An aspiring writer marries a British aristocrat, and goes to live with him and his sister in their sinister ancestral home. She is tormented by ghostly apparitions and seeks to uncover the terrifying secrets in the family's past. Guillermo del Toro's gothic horror, starring Mia Wasikowska, Tom Hiddleston and Jessica Chastain

programme.desc: A mother is thrilled when the daughter who went missing five years earlier turns up on her doorstep out of the blue. But her joy is short-lived as the now 17-year-old is suffering from severe trauma and cannot account for her absence - and matters grow even worse when mysterious strangers begin following them. Thriller, starring Samaire Armstrong and Sierra McCormick

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Luxury heritage train The Northern Belle, aka steam locomotive 6201 Princess Elizabeth, travels through England's rural north west. Beginning in Preston, the passengers of its stylish 1930s Pullman carriages are soon whisked up through Cumbria and the spectacular landscapes of the Lake District. The train continues on to historic Carlisle, the site of a world-class medieval cathedral and home to supposedly England's most haunted station. It then joins the Settle to Carlisle line, considered one of the most scenic railway routes in the world

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary about the work of the elite crime-fighting units of Nottinghamshire police, following officers from the traffic units, the knife crime team and the armed response unit

programme.title: Casualty 24/7
programme.desc: The team are facing one of the busiest days in Barnsley Casualty's history, and the pressure mounts on staff members as patients await beds to become available, so self-named Emergency Clown Sister Jane helps to give the younger nurses a moral boost during this difficult period. Meanwhile, consultant doctor Jane treats 10-year-old Oliver, who suffers from a rare condition called Angelman Syndrome

programme.title: Woman with the World's Biggest Hips
programme.desc: Documentary about four plus-size women who refuse to bow to the pressures of Hollywood size-zero 'ideal', and are proud of their figures. Mikel has hips that are eight feet in circumference and loves her 'unique physique', while Austrian-born Claudia works as a professional model in sunny Los Angeles. Elsewhere, New Yorker Marlena struts her stuff in a dance studio, while Denise makes a living by selling clips of her curves to men who are attracted to the fuller figure

programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at how people buy, sell and market sex. A disparate group of relatively new recruits to Britain's flourishing and fast-growing porn industry reveals what life is really like when trying to make a living in the adult movie industry

programme.title: The Real Narcos UK: Blood & Fear
programme.desc: The stories of some of Britain's most powerful gangsters, looking at how they came to control the drugs trade in four of the nation's biggest cities. The first edition reveals how brothers Dessie, Dominic and Damian Noonan rose to dominate Manchester in the 1980s and '90s, taking over the doors of the city's clubs like the Hacienda to control the supply of drugs onto the dancefloor. Featuring interviews with a bare-knuckle boxer, a bouncer who used to run with their gang, and the police officers who were on their trail

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The World's Most Expensive Cruise Ships
programme.desc: The Seven Seas Explorer prepares to leave Southampton on a cruise around the Baltics, but as 700 new guests board the vessel various challenges await the crew as the terrible British weather threatens to scupper the lavish Sail Away Party. Every Sunday at sea, the Explorer puts on a spectacular no-expenses-spared Sea Day Brunch, though after a rocky start it remains to be seen whether it will meet the expectations of the demanding guests. Meanwhile, there's is a first in the 20-year career of cruise director John, as he receives a special invitation from the guests of the £8,000-a-night Regent Suite

programme.title: Get Your Tatts Out: Kavos Ink
programme.desc: Three lads hit a Greek tattoo studio after a heavy night's drinking, only for one of them to wake up the next day with a 'burger nipple'. Another holiday-maker loses a bet which means he has to get a picture of his friends etched on his backside, and a Manchester bloke waltzes out of a tattoo studio with a pair of lips inked onto his bum

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski investigates the period after the Second World War, which saw the birth of a modern style of ecclesiastical architecture. He visits Coventry and Chichester cathedrals to highlight the contemporary designs

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Design guru Ann Maurice visits a house with an unsightly pile of brick rubble, investigates a property whose garden is a potential death trap, and delivers her verdict on a conservatory used to store laundry in this compilation of highlights from the series

programme.title: BSL Zone: This Is Deaf
programme.desc: BSL Programme

programme.title: The Furies (1950)
programme.desc: The daughter of a ruthlessly ambitious cattle baron is divided between her love for one of his enemies and the prospect of taking over the family ranch when he dies. But when the cruel rancher has one of her friends hanged, she begins plotting his downfall. Western from director Anthony Mann, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Walter Huston

programme.title: Ten Tall Men (1951)
programme.desc: A Foreign Legion sergeant learns a tribal leader is planning to launch an attack on a remote fort, and leads a small band of soldiers into the desert to distract the enemy hordes. However, he soon discovers a more dangerous threat - the Legion's various foes are plotting to join forces. Comedy adventure, starring Burt Lancaster, Jody Lawrence and Kieron Moore

programme.title: Anne of the Thousand Days (1969)
programme.desc: Henry VIII wins the hand of his ill-fated second wife Anne Boleyn by divorcing his first queen Katherine of Aragon, leading to a cataclysmic rift between the English Crown and the Vatican. However, when the marriage fails to produce a male heir, Henry and his council bring allegations of adultery, incest and treason against Anne, and condemn her to death. Historical drama, starring Richard Burton, Genevieve Bujold, Anthony Quayle, Michael Hordern and Irene Papas

programme.title: Stardust (2007)
programme.desc: A young shop assistant in Victorian England enters a magical parallel world in search of a fallen star to give to the girl of his dreams. However, the star in question is in fact a beautiful woman, who he helps flee from a wicked witch and a murderous prince. Fantasy adventure, based on Neil Gaiman's novel, with Charlie Cox, Claire Danes, Michelle Pfeiffer, Robert De Niro, Mark Strong and Sienna Miller. Narrated by Ian McKellen

programme.title: All The Money in the World (2017)
programme.desc: When 16-year-old John Paul Getty III is kidnapped in 1973, his devoted mother tries to convince his billionaire grandfather Jean Paul Getty to pay the ransom. Ridley Scott's fact-based drama, starring Michelle Williams, an Oscar-nominated Christopher Plummer, who replaced Kevin Spacey a few weeks before the film was released, and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: The Bone Collector (1999)
programme.desc: A quadriplegic ex-cop is saved from the brink of suicide by a rookie female officer needing his expertise to form a psychological profile of a serial killer. The murderer is posing as a cab driver and terrorising Manhattan, and has a gruesome habit of taking trophies from his victims' bodies. Thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Angelina Jolie, Michael Rooker, Mike McGlone, Luis Guzman and Queen Latifah

programme.title: P'Tang Yang Kipperbang (1982)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old schoolboy Alan struggles to cope with growing up in the post-war period. He becomes infatuated with a classmate but is too shy to do anything about it. When he learns he will have to kiss her in the school play, he is terrified at the prospect. Director Michael Apted's comedy drama, starring John Albasiny, Alison Steadman, Abigail Cruttenden and Robert Urquhart

programme.title: Rage at Dawn (1955)
programme.desc: Three notorious outlaw brothers terrorise Indiana, using a small town as a safe haven and paying off local officials to turn a blind eye. A detective poses as a fellow bandit to set a trap for them, but the case is complicated when he falls for their sister, who remains misguidedly loyal to her villainous family. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Forrest Tucker, Mala Powers and J Carrol Naish

programme.title: His Girl Friday (1940)
programme.desc: A conniving newspaper editor is horrified to learn his ex-wife - who is also happens to be his best reporter - is planning to remarry. Determined to keep her on his staff, he comes up with the one thing he knows she cannot resist - a big story. Meanwhile, he arranges it so that her fiance has a run of misfortune. Comedy, starring Cary Grant, Rosalind Russell and Ralph Bellamy

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling

programme.title: 40 Guns to Apache Pass (1967)
programme.desc: A cavalry captain sets out to deliver a shipment of rifles to a fort besieged by marauding Apaches, but the mission is undermined by a villainous corporal who plans to steal the weapons and sell them to the enemy. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: American Animals (2018)
programme.desc: Spencer is a bored middle-class art student in Kentucky. He fills time gazing at the multi-million-dollar rare art book collection in the University library and decides that theft might give him the kicks he needs to feel special. Writer/director Bart Layton's crime thriller, starring Evan Peters, Barry Keoghan and Blake Jenner

programme.title: Layer Cake (2004)
programme.desc: A London cocaine dealer is all set to leave the criminal world behind and start a new life abroad. However, his plans are thwarted when he is asked to track down a gangster's drug-addicted daughter and locate a stolen shipment of Ecstasy. Crime thriller, starring Daniel Craig, Michael Gambon, Colm Meaney, Kenneth Cranham and Sienna Miller

programme.title: Enduring Love (2004)
programme.desc: After witnessing a shocking accident, a man and his girlfriend attempt to put the traumatic events behind them - but their efforts are thwarted by the increasingly obsessive attentions of a loner who was also at the scene. Thriller, adapted from a novel by Ian McEwan, starring Daniel Craig, Rhys Ifans and Samantha Morton

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: The Guilty (2018)
programme.desc: Asger, a frustrated and troubled cop, is mired in a mysterious workplace controversy and has been confined to the emergency response help lines while the issue is resolved. He gets a confusing call from a woman named Iben, who appears to be in immediate danger after being abducted by her partner. Asger tries to piece together where she is and how to get help to her. Writer/director Gustav Moller's crime drama, starring Jakob Cedergren. In Danish with English subtitles

programme.title: Heat (1995)
programme.desc: An armoured car hold-up sets a veteran police detective on the trail of a highly intelligent career criminal, whom he is obsessed with capturing. Meanwhile, the robber is planning an elaborate bank heist as his final job before retiring, and a complex game of cat and mouse develops between the two. Michael Mann's crime thriller, starring Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer, Jon Voight, Tom Sizemore and Natalie Portman

programme.title: Skin Trade (2014)
programme.desc: After his family is killed by a Serbian gangster with international interests, a New York detective goes to south-east Asia to team up with a Thai detective to destroy the syndicate's human trafficking network. Thriller, starring Dolph Lundgren, Tony Jaa, Michael Jai White and Ron Perlman

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Pastry Day for the second heat of bakers and their last chance to win a place in Finals Week. Ravneet's Technical Challenge takes his audience to Spain where a classic snack is given a Junior Bake Off twist. Then the bakers are tasked with creating a Showstopper in the form of a savoury pie for a celebration, using imagination and technique to create truly unique pastry decorations. However, only one contender can will be awarded star baker and one other must leave the tent. Harry Hill hosts, alongside judges Liam Charles and Ravneet Gill

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm misses his aunt's funeral in favour of a date, who surprises him by arriving early and catching him half-dressed. Comedy, starring Frankie Muniz

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard receives shocking news as everyone prepares for the re-opening of the comic-book store. Penny tries to teach Sheldon how to 'let it go', but she is unable to follow her own advice when she learns something infuriating about Amy. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Fillion, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny agree to participate in an unusual experiment, and Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily spend the evening trying to escape from a 'zombie'. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Young Sheldon

George Sr and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household, while Missy flushes a fried chicken down the toilet which causes it to overflow. US comedy, with Lance Barner, Annie Potts and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Joan and Barry Manville are downsizing from their family home in Bolton. But they are completely torn on where to buy their new home. Joan wants to remain in the UK and move to the seaside resort of Lytham St Annes, but Barry is looking for a new adventure in the beautiful countryside of southern Brittany. Laura Hamilton pulls out all the stops to keep them in the UK with a budget of £125,000, while Jonnie Irwin does everything he can to impress Joan to buy in France with three charming properties for up to £65,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole refurbishes a classic Ford Mustang and a neon garage sign, while Simon O'Brien restores a classic Chopper bicycle and turns a bass guitar into a chair

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Arthur race to collect low-hanging fruit to make delicious redcurrant jelly. In south-west France, Donna and Paul are hard at work on their most ambitious project yet, creating a tea room. However, stringent building regulations add to the challenge. Elsewhere, Ithaca and Alex need to raise some cash to help repair their chateau's 300-year-old roof

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets retired couple Steve and Chris Elliot, who are building an Arts and Crafts-inspired modern eco-home. DIY enthusiast Steve wants to do a lot of the work himself, but the presenter warns against it as it could take up too much time, and the pair want to be moved in within a year

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at Acqua Beach in Weymouth, where Charlotte Weaver and her best friend Lucy Falkingham hope their quirky design and decor makes them stand out from the crowd. But Stephen thinks the price is far from right and Derek and Lynne take exception to the decoration. During an afternoon of sand sculpting, things get personal for Adam and his partner Susan Lewes, then at dinner Derek upsets Charlotte with his comments on her design choices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to Langmead Guest House in Ramsgate, where owners Derek and Lynne Love are all about keeping it simple. Adam and Susan are not blown away by the beige interior while Charlotte and Lucy are horrified to discover moths in the bed. During an afternoon playing crazy golf 'with a twist', simmering tension is revealed between Charlotte and Stephen, which erupts at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Big Green Bus in Lewes, where carpenter Adam Collier-Woods and his girlfriend Susan Lerski run an unconventional B&B on a converted double-decker bus. On arrival, all the guests are shocked to discover where they'll be sleeping, and during an afternoon foraging for wild garlic, professional chef Stephen plays a trick on the group as Charlotte and Lucy reveal their competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to the Pheasant hotel in Brill, Buckinghamshire, where professional chef Stephen Orr hopes his top-level place will win the day. On arrival, Adam and Susan are bowled over by the beautiful views and all the guests are surprised by the quality of the rooms. However, on closer inspection, Charlotte and Lucy are unimpressed by dust and a cobweb

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Stephen from the Pheasant tries to avoid a grilling by explaining his motives for pulling the wool over the group's eyes

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George looks back over several of the best projects from more than five years of the programme, and this episode features some of the youngest small-space designers. In Somerset, 12-year-old Gwynnie wants her own luxury party shed, while in south-west London, Marcus attempts a boat restoration project with a young woman he has recently met. In north Wales, George revisits a pair of newlyweds who converted an old army truck into a mobile campervan rather than go on honeymoon

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: At Chester Zoo, Rothschild giraffe Tula is a week overdue after a 13-month pregnancy. But keepers are anxious that history could repeat itself - she gave birth to a stillborn calf last year. Cameras also follow this year's brood of penguin chicks. They are about to face the ordeal of joining the main pool, where they must compete for fish with the adult penguins. And baby silvery gibbon Eko learns how to swing between ropes - 50 feet up

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: The Strawbridges head to the beaches of Saint-Malo with Angel's parents to seek out chateau inspiration. Ithaca and Alex's fundraiser in northern France is a logistical nightmare, but becomes a hot ticket. First impressions are important to Angela and Steve, who get stuck in a last-minute fix as they try to restore their chateau's electric gates before the first rental guests of the season arrive

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Mary Martin and Carl Turner want to build a home that resembles a giant stack of glass cubes in Brixton, south London. The couple are hoping the structure will become an instant landmark, while on the inside they are planning a Zen retreat. But to succeed, their finances must be pushed to their limit, so Carl takes on as many of the specialist jobs as he can to save money. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: The Yorkshire Dales and the Lakes
programme.desc: A look at summer in the national parks, with father and son shepherds Peter and Robert Bland bringing their flock of Herdwick sheep down off the fell for their annual shearing

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth tackle their first manual lock and some terrifyingly tight turns, but find themselves relaxing into life at 4mph, and marvel at how secret histories reveal themselves. They visit the Royal Gunpowder Mills, which built its own canal system to transport volatile ammunition - vital to Britain's success in both world wars

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 21-year-old woman on her first trip to London from Northern Ireland appears to be experiencing kidney failure, and medics fear she could be at risk of a cardiac arrest. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 21-year-old woman on her first trip to London from Northern Ireland appears to be experiencing kidney failure, and medics fear she could be at risk of a cardiac arrest. A man in a critical condition after falling 20ft from a balcony is brought in by helicopter, and a 34-year-old who fell off her platform shoes while dancing is treated for a deep gash on her forehead

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the junk-food diets of children who are fussy eaters, visiting one of the largest studies into childhood eating habits in the world to find out what is reasonable to categorise as normal behaviour and when parents should seek help. She learns about a newly discovered eating disorder that has so far been largely undiagnosed and could be behind thousands of cases of fussy eating in the UK

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike

First impressions are important to Angela and Steve, who get stuck in a last-minute fix as they try to restore their chateau's electric gates before the first rental guests of the season arrive

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Mark and Gillian Webb, who plan to build a home in Hertfordshire in the style of a Georgian rectory. The couple were initially expecting to do as little of the work as possible themselves, but budget constraints mean they have to get their hands dirty on the project. The presenter hopes to inspire the pair by sending them to see a similar build in London

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Miners Arms in Nenthead, Cumbria, where sisters Alison Baker and Lynda Clark hope to impress guests with their eco credentials

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and James Widdas run the Rose and Crown in Edgworth, near Bolton, and hope to provide boutique on a budget, but veterans Alison and Lynda are quick to find fault

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nigel and Pok U Regan hope to impress their fellow hoteliers with their east-meets-west atmosphere at Bingham Townhouse, a B&B and Cantonese restaurant in Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Float by Boat near Rugby, partners Kev Argent and Tor Johnson run mindfulness breaks from their narrowboat, but Alison and Lynda are not keen on the tiny shared bathroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees Andrew and James Widdas from the Rose and Crown confront their critics about their polyester bedding. Nigel and Pok U from the Bingham Townhouse have some explaining to do when it comes to their breakfast service, while Kev and Tor from Float by Boat are left in tears by the payments they receive

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect and presenter revisits some of the finest builds from across Europe, with an epic mountain-top retreat in the Italian Alps and a glass-walled lake house in Lugano. There is also an ingenious bed in Gelnhausen, Germany and a floating home in Denmark partly made out of recycled debris. Plus, in Barcelona, George visits possibly the smallest city home he's ever seen - a 24-square-metre roof top studio apartment where everything is hidden in the walls

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's 18 chimpanzees face upheaval when new female chimp Vila arrives from a zoo in Germany. Meanwhile, nine-year-old cheetah mum Kinky Tail is vomiting after meals, and her three-year-old daughter Safi must watch and wait as her mum is taken to the zoo's medical centre. Cameras also follow Asian short-clawed otter Annie, who recently gave birth to a large litter of five pups

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: DIY fanatic Fiona contends with sub-zero temperatures as she sets out to renovate a chateau bedroom for her daughter, who is due to visit in two months, while new owners Erin and JB aim to transform the first floor of their property's south wing

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows Lysette and Nigel Offley, who are knocking down an old Thames boathouse and constructing a cutting-edge home in its place. Taking inspiration from the river itself, they have designed a building of waves and curves with a huge glass porthole for a roof light. But problems begin almost from the start, as they cannot find a contractor willing to build over the water, their architect leaves unexpectedly and the costs turn out much higher than expected. To make matters worse, the neighbours are not happy about such a radical sight in their traditional community. As they begin to compromise, Kevin wonders if the couple's dreams will ever be realised

programme.title: Chatsworth House: A Great British Year
programme.desc: Abseiling surveyors check the condition of the gold leaf-coated window frames that were recently the subject of expensive renovation - but come back with a nasty discovery

programme.title: Luxury Cruises: From Boom to Bust?
programme.desc: Kate Quilton examines how ocean travel was transformed from a simple journey to a luxurious holiday in itself. Once the preserve of the wealthy, in the 1980s and 1990s the cruise industry became one of the most extraordinary boom stories, making luxury affordable to the masses. Then Covid shut the industry down. Joined by experts, Kate explores the boom years, the challenges and disasters that rocked the industry, and also considers the post-pandemic future

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-old's finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Rob Beckett take on guest team captain Alan Carr and Sarah Millican in the classic words-and-numbers quiz, while Nick Mohammed joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-old's finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the 2019 listeria outbreak in UK hospitals that left six dead and asks if enough is being done to protect vulnerable patients from a failing food safety system. She meets scientists to uncover just what listeria is and how the outbreak happened, goes inside a hospital kitchen to see first-hand how food is made and speaks with an anonymous government whistleblower who reveals cutbacks could mean another deadly outbreak will happen again
